title: MagicWorld
description: added 4 elemental type magic ice fire air lighting all types has 4 skill in world added 2 new structures and 1 boss
body:
magic world this mod added magic to get it you need craft or find spell book.Also added 2 new wearpons magic stuff and dark sword they have own skill to get magic stuff you need craft it or find it to get dark sword you need kill boss<dark knight > he will drop dark iron after it just craft it.
mod have lvl system 1 used skill 1 exp 100 xp = 1 lvl max lvl10. every lvl 
you get 1 skill point with skill point you can get more heath or more spell
damage and more.
